headline: Silicon Valley's next generation feels the AI blues
description: In California, the rise of artificial intelligence no longer generates the unanimous enthusiasm it once did. Anxiety is mounting, especially among students and engineers, as jobs have been cut and democratic risks have grown more threatening.

headline: Houston killing of Mexican man by ICE reignites debate over US immigration agency
Kyiv spends sleepless nights underground as Russia intensifies attacks
'Behind the suffering there are people who love life, art and peace': Words of hope from a poetry contest in Gaza
description: About 60 students from Gaza, aged 18 to 25, responded to a call from the French Institute of Gaza and the NGO Academic Solidarity with Palestine by submitting poems or videos in which they shared, in French, their feelings and hopes in the face of the war that has affected them for almost three years.

headline: France's third heatwave of the year drags on, less intense than the previous one but still stifling
description: Twenty-four departments in northwestern France and the Paris region will be placed on red heat alert on Saturday, with 56 departments on orange alert. The very high temperatures could persist until Thursday.

headline: 'Foreign Tongues': The Rolling Stones ride a second wave of youth with new album
description: Without reinventing their formula, Mick Jagger and Keith Richards have delivered a catchy and revitalizing record that makes listeners forget the more uneven albums of the past few decades.

headline: Le Monde's eight favorite exhibitions at Arles Photography Festival
description: Our culture critic has selected her favorite exhibitions among the 36 offerings at the major photography festival held throughout the southern French city.

description: Each time a new heatwave hits, the question of air conditioning and its environmental impacts crops up in the public debate. Here are the key points to help you understand what is at stake.

headline: Eurostar sounds alarm over overcrowding at London's Saint Pancras station
description: As rail competition between Paris and London is set to arrive in the 2030s and with Eurostar having ordered new trains, limited station capacity – especially in London – is hampering market growth.

headline: How Ukraine is turning Crimea, the Russians' Riviera, into a battlefield
description: The annexed Ukrainian peninsula, which Vladimir Putin sees as his crowning jewel, has descended into chaos as Kyiv ramps up attacks on the territory. Shocked tourists and residents express their distress as shortages worsen.
